message:
fix(fwc): retry_controller trailing comma and related cleanups

- Remove trailing comma in format! macro (retry_controller.rs:328)
- Remove 2x unnecessary .into_iter() calls (schema_nav.rs:448,465)
- Fix pipe_dispatch exit code: UnknownCommand → Validation for missing --map arg
